summary: Upbeat, solid‑set show with clear recording despite unknown source type
review: Listeners describe the concert as energetic and well‑sequenced, with a solid set list that keeps the vibe upbeat. The recording is praised as very good and listenable, though reviewers do not specify whether it’s soundboard or audience sourced. One reviewer notes sloppy playing and weak vocals from Garcia, giving the overall impression a mixed but generally positive feel.

ai_rating.rationale: Three out of four reviewers rate the show highly (4–5 stars) and compliment the recording, while one points out performance flaws; overall rating leans strong with good technical quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as "very good recording" and clear enough for casual listening; no specific issues or source details mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid, upbeat set list with consistent energy; no detailed comments on pacing beyond overall positivity.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia noted as "not all there" with a weak voice by one reviewer, though another mentions occasional nice playing.
